title: Pass-the-Ticket: Logon with Explicit Credentials from Unusual Source
description: Detects Event 4648 explicit credential logons where a machine account impersonates a user — common in pass-the-ticket, over-pass-the-hash, and Rubeus asktgt attacks. Correlates with source IP to identify lateral movement.
query: 'Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' and 'Event ID' = '4648' and not 'Original Log Content' like '%TargetServerName:localhost%' | eval Subject = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'SubjectUserName:([^;]+)'), Target = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'TargetUserName:([^;]+)'), TargetServer = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'TargetServerName:([^;]+)') | stats count as Attempts by Subject, Target, TargetServer, Entity | where Attempts > 5 | sort -Attempts
falsepositives: Service accounts delegating credentials to multiple servers
